hooks.command: P="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$P" ] && exit 0; case "$P" in *.loop/session.json) SCHEMA=session ;; *.loop/*/task-state.json) SCHEMA=task-state ;; *.loop/api-contracts.json) SCHEMA=api-contracts ;; *.loop/*/plan.json) SCHEMA=plan ;; *.loop/*/subagent-receipts/*.json) SCHEMA=subagent-receipt ;; *.loop/phases/*/metrics.json) SCHEMA=phase-metrics ;; *.loop/events.jsonl) exit 0 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; node scripts/lib/forge-state.mjs validate "$P" --schema "$SCHEMA" 1>&2

CMD="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; node scripts/lib/forge-mode.mjs gate --tool Bash --command "$CMD" 1>&2; RC=$?; if [ $RC -eq 3 ]; then printf '%s\n' 'forge-mode: DENIED by policy (mode=suggest or hard-deny rule)' 1>&2; exit 2; elif [ $RC -eq 2 ]; then exit 2; fi; exit 0
